name: Rainbow Rope Hanging Kids' Wall Decor - Pillowfort™
description: Bring a colorful, whimsical touch to your kid's decor with this Rainbow Rope Hanging Wall Decor from Pillowfort™. Designed with multicolor ropes with white tassels along the ends, this hanging wall decor lends a colorful appeal to their decor. Hang this rainbow wall art along their bed to create a beautiful setting they'll love.
